title: alnus ovata var. repens
intro: Alnus ovata var. repens, also known as the creeping alder, is a variety of the alder tree that is native to Western North America. This deciduous shrub or small tree is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Alnus ovata var. repens include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and support immune function. Alnus ovata var. repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
